sections.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands). Rules: Reported yes/no questions use 'if' or 'whether' + normal word order (not question order) | Reported WH questions keep the WH word but drop question order/question mark | Reported commands use told/ordered/asked + object + to + base verb | Negative commands use 'not to + base verb'
sections.formula: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)

examples.hindi: उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम आ रहे हो?"
उसने पूछा कि क्या मैं आ रहा था।
examples.english: He asked if I was coming.

examples.hindi: उसने पूछा, "तुम कहाँ रहते हो?"
उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था।
उसने कहा, "यह काम करो।"
उसने मुझे यह काम करने को कहा।
examples.english: He told me to do this work.

sections.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)

examples.hindi: उसने कहा, "यहाँ मत आओ।"
उसने मुझे यहाँ न आने को कहा।
examples.english: She told me not to come here.

examples.hindi: उन्होंने पूछा, "क्या तुम तैयार हो?"
उन्होंने पूछा कि क्या मैं तैयार था।
examples.english: They asked if I was ready.

examples.hindi: उसने पूछा, "तुम क्या कर रहे हो?"
उसने पूछा कि मैं क्या कर रहा था।
examples.english: He asked what I was doing.

sections.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)

examples.hindi: टीचर ने कहा, "चुप रहो।"
टीचर ने हमें चुप रहने को कहा।
examples.english: The teacher told us to be quiet.

examples.hindi: उसने पूछा, "तुम कब आओगे?"
उसने पूछा कि मैं कब आऊँगा।
examples.english: She asked when I would come.

sections.title: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Asked + if/whether (yes/no) or WH word + subject + verb | Told/Ordered + object + to + base verb (commands)

examples.hindi: डॉक्टर ने कहा, "दवा लो।"
डॉक्टर ने मुझे दवा लेने को कहा।
examples.english: The doctor told me to take medicine.

examples.hindi: उसने पूछा, "क्या तुम्हें मदद चाहिए?"
उसने पूछा कि क्या मुझे मदद चाहिए थी।
examples.english: He asked if I needed help.
